titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 41: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 41. (A.R. No. 46 of 1923.) PUḶḶALŪR, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On stone built indifferently into the walls of the Kāmākshi Amman shrine in the Kailāśanātha temple.

Records that the queen Seyya(Jaya ?)bhuvanasundaramaṇiyār donated a lampstand as well as ten kaḻañju of gold for burning a perpetual lamp, to the god Śrī Rāghavar, who is pleased to stand at Tiruvayōdhi, at Pulvēḷūr in Eyiṟ-kōṭṭam with the interest of one uḻakku of oil daily. The Gaṇapperumakkaḷ undertook to have the lamp burnt.

It is also recorded that the sabhaiyār of Pulvēḷūr took over the gold entrusted to the gaṇapperumakkaḷ by the queen and undertook the responsibility of burning the lamp perpetually. The sabhaiyār also agreed to pay a fine of eight and half-akāṇam daily by the officials of dhanmāśanam if they defaulted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiThe Letter sti is engraved below the line. śrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu nālāvatu Ivvāṇṭu nampirāṭṭiyār ceyyaThe Letter ya is engraved below the line.puvana śuntramaṇiyār Eyiṟkkoṭṭattu pulveḷur tiruvayodhi niṉṟaruḷina [śrī]rāgavaṟkku cantrādittavaṟ Erippatāka vaitta nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟu IvviḷaThe Letter ḷa is engraved below the line.kku(k)kkuṭutta poṉ patiṉ kaḻañcu
m patiṉ kaḻañcālum vanta policaiThe Letter cai is engraved below the line.nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇai Erivatākavum Ittarmmam rakṣittār Aśvamedham ceytaThe Letter ta is engraved below the line.palamThe Letter m is engraved below the line.peṟuvatākavum Itu vilakki(na)nārThere is an unnecessary stroke over the letter na like ni and the long vowel � it is engraved like 7 which however may be iṅnored and read vilakkinār • gaṅkai Iṭaikkumari Iṭai ceyta pāvam koḷvār IpparicūRead paricuOṭṭi kuṭuttom kaṇapperumakkaḷom ..ippoṉ ceyya bhu
vaṉa śuntra maṇiyār Ippulveḷur tiruvaiyoddhip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku kaṇapperumakkaḷ vaḻi Oru tiruviḷakku Erippatākak kuṭutta poṉ pulveḷur sabhaiyom koṇṭu Ittiruviḷakkuc cantraādittaval sabhaiyome Erippomāṉom
Itaṟku Ivvūrom virodham pannomaiRead paṇṇāmai śrīkoyil kaṭaik kāṇpāre meyiv veṟṟuvakai dhanmāsaṉattār nicati Eṭṭaraik kāṇam taṇṭamiṭuvataāka Oṭṭik kuṭuttom pulveḷur sabhaiyom ....
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
